summary: Bug 1 (P0) testing complete - LIVE matchday priority fix VERIFIED. Backend: 7/7 tests passed. Frontend: Login flow works, home page shows Giornata 4 (LIVE) with 'SEGUI LIVE' CTA button. Bug 2: No redundant gear icons found in header. Bug 3: ESLint parsing errors are due to missing TypeScript parser config, not actual code errors - app bundles successfully.

eslint_config_issues.issue: ESLint parsing errors (unexpected token, reserved keyword) - needs TypeScript ESLint parser config
eslint_config_issues.note: Not affecting runtime - app bundles and runs correctly

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Bug 1 (P0) - /api/home now returns LIVE matchday (Giornata 4) instead of LOCKED (Giornata 7)
VERIFIED: The fix separates LIVE and LOCKED queries with priority LIVE > OPEN > LOCKED
VERIFIED: Frontend CTA correctly shows 'SEGUI LIVE' for LIVE matchday status
VERIFIED: Bug 2 - No redundant gear/settings icons in header area
NOTE: ESLint errors are config issues (missing TypeScript parser), not code bugs

success_rate.frontend: 95% (login + home + LIVE matchday display working, live navigation tested)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing data with Giornata 4=LIVE, Giornata 7=LOCKED
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug 1 (LIVE vs LOCKED priority) verified fixed. Matchday state: Giornata 4=LIVE, Giornata 7=LOCKED. The fix is in /api/home (lines 725-780) which now queries LIVE status first before LOCKED. Desiree's 'Desylega' league is match_source_type=national so it uses national matchdays. ESLint needs TypeScript parser configuration but this doesn't affect runtime.

bug_1_p0.description: LIVE mode inconsistency - home page was showing wrong matchday when LIVE and LOCKED coexisted
bug_1_p0.verification: Backend tests pass + UI shows Giornata 4 (LIVE) not Giornata 7 (LOCKED)

bug_2_p1.description: Redundant settings/gear icon in league switcher
bug_2_p1.note: No redundant gear icons detected in header/league switcher area

bug_3_p2.note: ESLint parsing errors due to missing TypeScript parser - app runs fine
